approve_date.text: วันที่ลาออก

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_mem_name, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as collname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' ) ) /*WHERE*/ -- AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date between '1/6/2020' and '30/6/2020' ) ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ASC
